svg.aria-label: Anatomy of an Agentic Agent: architecture diagram showing planning, memory, tools, model, environment, data sources, MCP, and multi-agent orchestration
svg.text: Autonomously performs tasks by designing workflows with available tools
API call to hosted model or local inference
Standardised tool discovery, resource access, prompt templates.
Every component is an attack surface. Every connection is a potential exploit path.
This is why agentic AI requires runtime security controls at every layer.
